name: Orange Couscous Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup orange juice (strained from cooking process, additional if needed)
1 tbsp mild honey (orange blossom, clover, or blended)
1/2 tsp cornstarch dissolved in 2 tsp water
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the orange juice and spices together with the honey.
2. Add the dry couscous to the mixture and simmer for 4-5 minutes until done.
3. Strain the couscous into a saucepan or skillet, retaining the juices.
4. Shape the couscous into a bombe (half-sphere) and press out any air bubbles if desired.
5. Place the shaped couscous on a serving platter.
6. Warm the strained juices with additional orange juice in a saucepan.
7. Stir in honey and optional spices, then dissolve cornstarch in water and add to the mixture.
8. Pour the hot glaze over the cake while still warm.
9. Serve by cutting wedges of the cake.
10. Additional glaze can be reserved for serving with slices.
11. Consider adding mandarin orange segments or more spices to enhance the flavor.
12. Mold the cake using a lightly oiled mold, such as a paper towel dipped in oil.
